csvFileId.title: csvFileId
csvFileId.description: The Salesforce ContentDocument ID for the generated file. Used internally for tracking. Do not display to user.

csvFileUrl.title: csvFileUrl
csvFileUrl.description: A direct download URL for the generated CSV file. Always present this to the user as a clickable markdown link: [Click here to download]({csvFileUrl})

fileName.title: fileName
fileName.description: The name of the generated CSV file. Format: SOD_Violations_{LeftObj}_vs_{RightObj}_{Timestamp}.csv. Display this so the user knows what file was created.

message.title: message
message.description: Success or status message from the export action. If the export succeeded, message confirms the record count. If no violations existed, the message states "No violations found — no file generated."

recordCount.title: recordCount
recordCount.description: The number of violation records included in the CSV file. Display this so the user knows how many records the file contains.
